home.hero_description: We are not just a supplier, but a renovation partner. From analysis to aftercare, we offer solutions that deliver on their promises.
home.why_subtitle: Renovation is more economical, sustainable, and faster than new construction. KORODUR delivers the right solution.
home.why_card1_text: Fast-curing systems enable reuse in hours instead of days.
home.why_card2_text: Heavy-duty materials for high-load areas, wet rooms, and extreme conditions.
home.why_card3_text: EPD-certified products, renovation instead of demolition. Good for budget and environment.
home.portfolio_subtitle: Three areas, one standard: maximum quality with minimal downtime.
home.cta_bottom_text: Contact us for individual consultation or browse through our references.

portfolio.title: Product Portfolio
portfolio.description: KORODUR offers well-designed renovation systems for three key application areas. Each system is engineered for maximum durability, minimal downtime, and long-term cost-effectiveness.
